productName: Dungeness Dank - CRAB CLAWS 0.5g Infused Joint Packs - YELLOW ZUSHI - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Yellow Zushi and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of tar, flowery, and citrus, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
